query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "danceopd: on-policy generative field distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core mechanism (score distillation for generative models) and the same specific problem (improving generation diversity in distillation-based methods) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing canonical prior work on the "On-Policy Generative Field Distillation" mechanism in a related modality (3D vs. the user's implied context).
